title: liatris ohlingerae
intro: Liatris ohlingerae, also known as Ohling's blazing star, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Liatris ohlingerae include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is also used in traditional folk medicine to treat a variety of ailments.
